subject: [AAF CertService] Increase certificates validity
commit_message:
[AAF CertService] Increase certificates validity

Root keys of certificate should have 10 years validity.

Issue-ID: AAF-1175
Signed-off-by: Tomasz Wrobel <tomasz.wrobel@nokia.com>
Change-Id: I0ff9ed6ff095baa0797a2af50eca740e9b4a5c6b

entries.message:
Patch Set 1: Cherry Picked from branch master.

The following files contain Git conflicts:
* kubernetes/aaf/components/aaf-cert-service/resources/certServiceClient-keystore.jks
* kubernetes/aaf/components/aaf-cert-service/resources/certServiceServer-keystore.jks
* kubernetes/aaf/components/aaf-cert-service/resources/certServiceServer-keystore.p12
* kubernetes/aaf/components/aaf-cert-service/resources/root.crt
* kubernetes/aaf/components/aaf-cert-service/resources/truststore.jks

we have an issue on the server: https://gating-results.onap.eu/results//109951-2/infrastructure-healthcheck/k8s/pod-onap-aaf-cert-service-5dd5ddb459-z7pfb-aaf-cert-service-logs.html

Patch Set 2:

> Patch Set 2: Code-Review-1
> 
> we have an issue on the server: https://gating-results.onap.eu/results//109951-2/infrastructure-healthcheck/k8s/pod-onap-aaf-cert-service-5dd5ddb459-z7pfb-aaf-cert-service-logs.html

It looks like something was wrong on cherry-pick. 
Master MR has correct certificates (https://gerrit.onap.org/r/c/oom/+/110003)
But when I checked certificates on cherry-pick (https://gerrit.onap.org/r/c/oom/+/109951), certificates exist, but were empty - it could check by keytool.

Patch Set 2:

Well, we`re not really introducing new functionality here, we`re updating a certificate within the CertService. 

There is some code, which generates the certs during the CertService deployment, but that`s new functionality, which we could plan for Guilin... but that`s not part of this submission here.
Uploaded patch set 3.
